Hearing On Defendant Toyota Motor Sales, U.S.A., Inc.'S Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT TOYOTA MOTOR SALES, USA, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING, TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 301, PER RECUSAL. MATTER TO BE HEARD ON JAN. 12, 2007. (302/PJM/pb) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
LAUREL HALBANY FROM BRAYTON PURCELL, 898-1555, appearing for PLAINTIFF AND OPPOSING PARTY
JOHN A. HOLMAN FROM BRYDON HUGO & PARKER, 808-0300, appearing for DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY

ARGUED AND The Court adopted it's tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT TOYOTA MOTOR SALES, U.S.A., INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. Defendant has failed to show that plaintiff cannot prove exposure to defendant's product in light of plaintiff's deposition testimony that brakes were purchased from defendant. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/pb) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
